name: io.github.jasonwagao/xuanxue-bazi-matching
description: Chinese BaZi (八字) compatibility analysis between two birth charts. Returns 0-100 compatibility score, five-elements balance, narrative, strengths, challenges, and recommendations. Rule-based, sub-200ms. Pay-per-call $0.02 USDC via x402 on Base.

environmentVariables.name: XUANXUE_PAYMENT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: x402 payment token for pay-per-call billing ($0.02 USDC on Base). Omit to receive 402 Payment Required challenges.

environmentVariables.name: XUANXUE_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL. Defaults to https://api.xuanxue.app
